name: Cell key
description: A cell key found in an underground ruin, deep beneath the poisoned land.

name: Duran's pick
description: A pickaxe I received from Duran blueshield, a warrior of the mountains.

name: Rusted armor
description: Formerly animated, once taken apart the armor begins to rust and becomes useless.

name: Rusted blade
description: Nothing can escape the flow of time.

name: Ancient gloves
description: Untarnished, unblemished royal. An exquisite design is present on the back of the gloves.

name: Ancient plate
description: Untarnished, unblemished, royal. Intact in honorable death, protecting its master.

name: Ancient boots
description: Untarnished, unblemished, royal. They adjust themselves to your size.

name: Ancient helm
description: Untarnished, unblemished royal. Sturdy but hard to look around in.

name: Ancient shield
description: Untarnished, unblemished royal. Its enchantment could repel a dragon's breath.

name: Staff of symbiosis
description: A mysterious artifact from the vault of the underground citadel.

name: Memory fragment
description: A fragmented shard of materialized memories.

name: Time core
description: The object is frozen in time, part of a larger, unknown magical mechanism.

name: Time watcher shield
description: The reflection on the shield displays moments from the world prior.
